recommendations.title: The Four Musketeers
recommendations.overview: The Four Musketeers defend the queen and her dressmaker from Cardinal Richelieu and Milady de Winter.

recommendations.title: Superman III
recommendations.overview: Aiming to defeat the Man of Steel, wealthy executive Ross Webster hires bumbling but brilliant Gus Gorman to develop synthetic kryptonite, which yields some unexpected psychological effects. Between rekindling romance with his high school sweetheart

recommendations.title: Robin and Marian
recommendations.overview: Robin Hood, aging none too gracefully, returns exhausted from the Crusades to woo and win Maid Marian one last time.

recommendations.title: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to the Forum
recommendations.overview: A wily slave must unite a virgin courtesan and his young smitten master to earn his freedom.

recommendations.title: Juggernaut
recommendations.overview: A terrorist demands a huge ransom in exchange for information on how to disarm the seven bombs he has planted aboard a trans-Atlantic cruise ship. Inspired by real events.

recommendations.title: The Batman/Superman Movie: World's Finest
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, TV Movie, Science Fiction, Family, Adventure
recommendations.overview: As the Joker visits Metropolis with a plan to kill Superman for Lex Luthor, Batman pursues the clown to Superman's turf.

recommendations.title: The Three Musketeers
recommendations.overview: In 17th century France, young D'Artagnan wants to join the King's Musketeers, but instead befriends three legendary musketeers—Athos, Porthos, and Aramis—and together, they become embroiled in the political intrigue surrounding King Louis XIII and hi

recommendations.title: LEGO Batman: The Movie - DC Super Heroes Unite
recommendations.overview: Joker teams up with Lex Luthor to destroy the world one brick at a time. It's up to Batman, Superman and the rest of the Justice League to stop them.

recommendations.title: Help!

recommendations.title: Superman II: The Richard Donner Cut
recommendations.overview: Superman agrees to sacrifice his powers to start a relationship with Lois Lane, unaware that three Kryptonian criminals he inadvertently released are conquering Earth.
